name: cruise
desc: Cruise is a powerful, intuitive, and fully-featured TUI (Terminal User Interface) for managing containers. Built with Go and Bubbletea, it offers a visually ri…
descFull: Cruise is a powerful, intuitive, and fully-featured TUI (Terminal User Interface) for managing containers. Built with Go and Bubbletea, it offers a visually rich, keyboard-first experience for managing containers, images, volumes, networks, logs and more — all from your terminal.
